creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
Manpage for cksum only documents "[-o 1 | 2]" where it should be
	"[-o 1 | 2 | 3]"

Fix: 

Hell if I know!  Played with this for 10 minutes and couldn't get
	anything better than "[-o 1 | 2|]".

	Please don't forget to fix in 2.2-STABLE also.
How-To-Repeat: 
	man cksum
